## Summary

Describe the user-facing and protocol impact of this change.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated deterministic tests
- [ ] Ran `devtools::document()`
- [ ] Ran `testthat::test_local()`
- [ ] Ran `lintr::lint_package()`
- [ ] Ran `R CMD check --as-cran`
- [ ] Updated `NEWS.md` when behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, private paths, sensitive transcripts, or account-specific configuration are included
- [ ] Approval and sandbox behavior remains conservative by default
